title: Fast Fiction Factory Extraction Validator Hardening
purpose: Local-first Extraction Contract hardening slice that preserves the Visual Review Hub, Claim Ledger, Timeline View, Profile/Ghost Flow, local persistence, JSON import/export, freeform review intake, and human-owned canon boundaries while adding standalone extraction payload validation, valid and invalid fixture payloads, and fixture smoke evidence before any model/API extractor or adapter integration exists.
validation_command: & { $files = @("public/review/index.html", "tools/fff-state.mjs", "artifacts/artifact-manifest.json", "artifacts/ARTIFACTS.md", "artifacts/sample-project-state.json", "artifacts/current-project-state.json", "artifacts/sample-extraction-payload.json", "artifacts/extraction-contract-smoke-result.json", "artifacts/extraction-validator-smoke-result.json", "artifacts/freeform-review-intake-smoke-result.json", "artifacts/profile-ghost-smoke-result.json", "artifacts/fff-current-review-screenshot.png", "artifacts/fff-review-contact-sheet.png", "docs/review/current-status.md", "docs/review/extraction-validator-hardening-review.md", "docs/review/extraction-contract-review.md", "docs/review/freeform-review-intake.md", "docs/data-model.md", "scripts/operator/open_review.ps1"); $fixtures = @("valid-minimal.json", "missing-source-refs.json", "overconfident-human-owned-decision.json", "invalid-routing-visual-asset-to-claim.json", "auto-canon-leak.json", "missing-review-safe-defaults.json", "unknown-fields-preservation.json") | ForEach-Object { Join-Path "artifacts/extraction-negative-fixtures" $_ }; $allFiles = $files + $fixtures; $missing = $allFiles | Where-Object { -not (Test-Path $_) }; if ($missing) { Write-Error ("Missing files: " + ($missing -join ", ")); exit 1 }; $manifest = Get-Content artifacts/artifact-manifest.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; if ($manifest.artifact_id -ne "fff-extraction-validator-hardening-001") { throw "Manifest artifact id mismatch" }; if ($manifest.preserved_artifact_id -ne "fff-extraction-contract-001") { throw "Preserved artifact id mismatch" }; if ($manifest.review_input_mode -ne "freeform") { throw "Review input mode mismatch" }; node tools/fff-state.mjs validate artifacts/sample-project-state.json; node tools/fff-state.mjs validate artifacts/current-project-state.json; node tools/fff-state.mjs validate-extraction artifacts/sample-extraction-payload.json; node tools/fff-state.mjs validate-extraction artifacts/extraction-negative-fixtures/valid-minimal.json; node tools/fff-state.mjs validate-extraction artifacts/extraction-negative-fixtures/unknown-fields-preservation.json; node tools/fff-state.mjs smoke-extraction-fixtures artifacts/extraction-negative-fixtures artifacts/extraction-validator-smoke-result.json; $smoke = Get-Content artifacts/extraction-validator-smoke-result.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; if (-not $smoke.passed) { throw "Extraction validator smoke did not pass" }; if ($smoke.summary.total -ne 7 -or $smoke.summary.mismatched -ne 0) { throw "Extraction validator smoke matrix mismatch" }; $html = Get-Content public/review/index.html -Raw; @("fff-extraction-validator-hardening-001", "fff-extraction-contract-001", "Extraction Contract", "Validator hardening", "Claim Ledger", "Timeline View", "Profile/Ghost Flow", "Toma fate", "brass moth truth", "Council motive") | ForEach-Object { if ($html -notmatch [regex]::Escape($_)) { throw ("Missing required Review Hub text: " + $_) } }; @("artifacts/fff-current-review-screenshot.png", "artifacts/fff-review-contact-sheet.png") | ForEach-Object { $item = Get-Item $_; if ($item.Length -le 0) { throw ("Empty visual artifact: " + $_) } }; Write-Output "Extraction Validator Hardening validation passed" }
validation_result: passed 2026-06-19T11:07:30+09:00; standalone extraction payload validation, state JSON validation, valid fixture validation, negative fixture smoke matrix, manifest checks, Review Hub text checks, visual artifact existence, git diff whitespace check, and MkDocs strict build completed successfully
review_prompt_hint: Review the Extraction Contract and validator hardening in natural language. You can comment on unsafe pass/fail behavior, missing fixture classes, routing rules, or any part that should remain held before adapter work.
next_action: Use the fixture smoke as the gate for a local-only extraction adapter spike that emits the reviewed contract shape without adding model/API behavior, publishing, AI video generation, database persistence, production sync, or final canon decisions.
